---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that Agentify doesn't support today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. CLI shape, recipe op, or API sketch welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Anything else — example sites, related issues, links.
